title: IIT Patna Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Junior Research Associate, Office Assistant and More Posts
post_name: Junior Research Associate, Office Assistant and More
short_info: Indian Institute of Technology Patna (IIT Patna) Research Positions under COIL-D Project Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Patna Research Positions under COIL-D Project Recruitment 2026. Candidates who possess B.Tech/B.E., MCA, M.Sc, B.A., M.A., M.Phil, PhD, MBA, B.Com, BCA, Diploma, or related qualifications as per the post requirement are eligible to apply for these vacancies. The application process for IIT Patna Research Positions under COIL-D Project Recruitment 2026 has already started, and interested candidate

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B. Tech./B.E. or MCA or M.Sc, B.A or M.A.or M.Phil./PhD or M.E./M.Tech./MBA, B.Com./B.Sc./BCA/Diploma
qualification.details: Junior Research Associate (Technical): B. Tech./B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, Information Technology, AI and DS, Electronics/Electronics and Tele Communication/Electrical Engineering or MCA or M.Sc (Computer Science). Desirable: Experience of building systems in AI, ML and NLP. Exposures of creating and maintaining GUI, Webpages; and having knowledge for data management. Junior Research Associate Language: a) B.A. (Language or Linguistics) with 2 years of experience in the relevant area; or b) M.A. (Language or Linguistics) with exposure in the relevant area; or c) M.Phil./PhD in language or linguistics or in the related discipline. d) Knowledge in Hindi/Maithili/Odia/Bengali languages. Desirable: Exposure for parallel corpus creation, data annotation etc. Experience of working in a language technology project. Liaison Officer: a) M.Sc (Computer Science or related area)/MCA/ M.A. (Mass Communication) with 1 year of experience; or b) M.E./M.Tech./MBA. Desirable: Exposure in Language Technology related project. Experience of coordination in a project. Experience in public relationship. Office Assistant: a) B.Com./B.Sc./BCA/Diploma (with 1-year experience), or B. Tech./B.E. Desirable: Have proficiency in MS Word, Excel etc. Knowledge in Webpage design. Accounting will be preferable.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Junior Research Associate Language (Hindi-01, Maithili-01, Odia-02, Bangla-01)

salary_details.details: Junior Research Associate (Technical): Rs. 50,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 45,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 50,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 30,000/month with 10% annual increment Junior Research Associate Language: Rs. 50,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 45,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 50,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 30,000/month with 10% annual increment Liaison Officer: Rs. 50,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 45,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 50,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 30,000/month with 10% annual increment Office Assistant: Rs. 50,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 45,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 50,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 30,000/month with 10% annual increment

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Patna Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
